title: Cleaning up completions.
body:
First patch makes podman run -<tab> work.
Also adds missing --help and -h completions to all options.

Second patch is just running whitespace cleanup from emacs on the file.

@rhatdan looks like you've a gofmt error, otherwise the code LGTM.

This gofmt error is the difference between gofmt 1.10 and 1.11.

We need to stop testing with both.
